title: Tunisian Brik Stuffed with Crispy Fish
description: A twist on the classic Tunisian dish, Brik, filled with crispy fish and served with a side of fresh herbs.

ingredients.name: Fish Fillets
ingredients.notes: white fish such as cod or tilapia works well

instructions: Prepare the fish by seasoning with salt and black pepper.
Dredge the fish in a mixture of crispy onion and Tunisian Harissa.
Place the fish in the center of each Brik pastry.
Brush the edges of the pastry with a little water.
Fold the pastry over the fish to form a triangle.
Seal the edges by pressing them together with a fork.
Brush the tops of the Brik with a little oil.
Bake in the oven for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.
Garnish with cilantro and serve hot.
